title: UTM Campaign Link Builder
metaDescription: Build properly encoded UTM tracking links for Google Analytics campaigns, instantly in your browser.
shortDescription: Build a UTM-tagged campaign URL for accurate analytics tracking.

guideSections.heading: Why Inconsistent UTM Naming Quietly Breaks Your Reports
guideSections.body: A campaign tagged 'Newsletter' in one link and 'newsletter' in another is treated as two separate sources by most analytics platforms, since UTM parameters are typically case-sensitive. Settling on a consistent naming convention before generating links matters more than the specific convention chosen.

guideSections.heading: Which Parameters Are Required vs Genuinely Optional
guideSections.body: utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are the three parameters every analytics platform expects populated. utm_term and utm_content add useful granularity for paid search keywords or A/B testing specific creative variants, but omitting them when not relevant keeps the URL shorter without losing essential tracking data.
